response.justification: Maria demonstrates strong engineering fundamentals and seniority (Staff-level, 14+ years), with proven ability to ship production systems at scale and mentor teams. However, there is a significant domain gap: the resume lacks explicit experience building experimentation frameworks, feature-flagging systems, or metrics/telemetry infrastructure—all central to this Principal role. Her work optimizing pricing strategies at Optilyz shows some data-driven thinking, but not the experimentation platform expertise required at this level.
strengths: 14+ years of production engineering across diverse stacks (C, C++, Java, JavaScript, Python) with proven ability to handle high-scale systems (millions of HTTP requests/second at Dunnhumby)
Current Staff-level role at re:cinq with demonstrated technical leadership and hands-on involvement in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling
Strong track record of knowledge sharing and team influence through workshops, refactoring dojos, and mentoring across multiple organizations
concerns: No explicit experience building experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature-flagging systems, or rollout/assignment infrastructure that define this Principal role
Limited demonstrated background in metrics infrastructure, telemetry foundations, statistical analysis, or data science collaboration—critical for growth/experimentation systems
Resume does not show evidence of leading multi-workstream initiatives spanning Product, Data Science, and Design teams at the scale this Principal role requires

key_factors.factor: Engineering seniority and production systems experience
